title: Italian Crumble Potato Bake
description: A simple Italian-inspired dish featuring crumble topping and potato, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a bowl, combine sliced potatoes and ricotta cheese.
Transfer the potato mixture to a baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together parmesan and breadcrumbs to create the crumble topping.
Sprinkle the crumble topping evenly over the potatoes.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the potatoes are tender and the topping is golden brown.
Remove from oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
